forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KT6R6HR3KJT6JVNDRAJV8V4T
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8480'
+project: short-ids
+title: 'Short IDs: mention identity — task ^ slug = short id (backend)'
+---
+Shared backend glue for the CM6 cards: make the task `^` mention key on the 7-char short id instead of slugify(title). Both the pill-rendering and autocomplete cards sit on this.
+
+## Background (from scoping)
+The CM6 mention stack is generic over prefix and already supports `^`/task, but the whole system keys on `slugify(displayName)`:
+- `task.yaml` (`crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`) declares `mention_prefix: "^"`, `mention_display_field: title`, and NO `mention_slug_field` → slug defaults to `slugify(title)`.
+- `search_mentions` (`apps/kanban-app/src/commands.rs`) returns title-derived slugs; frontend `buildMentionMetaMap` keys the metaMap by `slugify(title)`.
+
+## Scope
+- Give tasks a stable mention slug = the short id (derived from id), distinct from title. Likely a `mention_slug_field`/short-id concept wired so `search_mentions` returns `{ slug: short_id, display: title, color }` for tasks.
+- Ensure the frontend metaMap for tasks is keyed by short id, and exposes a short-id → title/color lookup that MentionWidget and the autocomplete `apply` can consume.
+- Backend resolver: short id → task (reuse core resolver via the tool/command boundary).
+
+## Out of scope
+- Inline pill decoration in the editor → short-ids-cm6-pills
+- Autocomplete insertion/label → short-ids-cm6-autocomplete
+
+## Acceptance
+- `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns short-id slugs + title display names.
+- Frontend can resolve a 7-char short id → task title/color without a title-slug round-trip.
+
+Depends on core derivation/resolver.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
 project: short-ids
 title: 'Short IDs: mention identity — task ^ slug = short id (backend)'
 ---
-Shared backend glue for the CM6 cards: make the task `^` mention key on the 7-char short id instead of slugify(title). Both the pill-rendering and autocomplete cards sit on this.
+Shared backend glue for the CM6 cards: make the task `^` mention key on the 7-char short id instead of slugify(title), and resolve BOTH short and full-ULID forms to a task. Both the pill-rendering and autocomplete cards sit on this.

 ## Background (from scoping)
 The CM6 mention stack is generic over prefix and already supports `^`/task, but the whole system keys on `slugify(displayName)`:
@@ -16,16 +16,16 @@
 - `search_mentions` (`apps/kanban-app/src/commands.rs`) returns title-derived slugs; frontend `buildMentionMetaMap` keys the metaMap by `slugify(title)`.

 ## Scope
-- Give tasks a stable mention slug = the short id (derived from id), distinct from title. Likely a `mention_slug_field`/short-id concept wired so `search_mentions` returns `{ slug: short_id, display: title, color }` for tasks.
-- Ensure the frontend metaMap for tasks is keyed by short id, and exposes a short-id → title/color lookup that MentionWidget and the autocomplete `apply` can consume.
-- Backend resolver: short id → task (reuse core resolver via the tool/command boundary).
+- Give tasks a stable mention slug = the short id (derived from id), distinct from title. Wire so `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns `{ slug: short_id, display: title, color }`.
+- Frontend task metaMap keyed by short id, exposing short-id → title/color for `MentionWidget` and autocomplete `apply`.
+- Resolver accepts BOTH the 7-char short id and the full 26-char ULID (full → last-7 → lookup), reusing the core resolver. This is the single resolution semantics shared by pills (forgiving display) and the tool API (forgiving input).

 ## Out of scope
-- Inline pill decoration in the editor → short-ids-cm6-pills
+- Inline pill decoration / shape-matching in the editor → short-ids-cm6-pills
 - Autocomplete insertion/label → short-ids-cm6-autocomplete

 ## Acceptance
 - `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns short-id slugs + title display names.
-- Frontend can resolve a 7-char short id → task title/color without a title-slug round-trip.
+- Frontend resolves a short id OR a full ULID → task title/color without a title-slug round-trip.

 Depends on core derivation/resolver.
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -8,24 +8,30 @@
 project: short-ids
 title: 'Short IDs: mention identity — task ^ slug = short id (backend)'
 ---
-Shared backend glue for the CM6 cards: make the task `^` mention key on the 7-char short id instead of slugify(title), and resolve BOTH short and full-ULID forms to a task. Both the pill-rendering and autocomplete cards sit on this.
+Shared backend glue for the CM6 cards: make the task `^` mention key on the 7-char short id (not slugify(title)), resolve BOTH short and full-ULID forms, and make task search match title + short id + full ULID. Both CM6 cards sit on this.

 ## Background (from scoping)
-The CM6 mention stack is generic over prefix and already supports `^`/task, but the whole system keys on `slugify(displayName)`:
-- `task.yaml` (`crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`) declares `mention_prefix: "^"`, `mention_display_field: title`, and NO `mention_slug_field` → slug defaults to `slugify(title)`.
-- `search_mentions` (`apps/kanban-app/src/commands.rs`) returns title-derived slugs; frontend `buildMentionMetaMap` keys the metaMap by `slugify(title)`.
+The CM6 mention stack is generic over prefix and supports `^`/task, but keys on `slugify(displayName)`:
+- `task.yaml` (`crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/task.yaml`) declares `mention_prefix: "^"`, `mention_display_field: title`, NO `mention_slug_field` → slug defaults to `slugify(title)`.
+- `search_mentions` (`apps/kanban-app/src/commands.rs`) returns title-derived slugs and matches the query against title only; frontend `buildMentionMetaMap` keys the metaMap by `slugify(title)`.
+
+## Roles (two of short id, two of title)
+- short id → mention slug (inserted token) AND pill label.
+- title → autocomplete dropdown label AND pill hover tooltip.
+So each task mention carries: `{ short_id, title, color }`.

 ## Scope
-- Give tasks a stable mention slug = the short id (derived from id), distinct from title. Wire so `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns `{ slug: short_id, display: title, color }`.
-- Frontend task metaMap keyed by short id, exposing short-id → title/color for `MentionWidget` and autocomplete `apply`.
-- Resolver accepts BOTH the 7-char short id and the full 26-char ULID (full → last-7 → lookup), reusing the core resolver. This is the single resolution semantics shared by pills (forgiving display) and the tool API (forgiving input).
+- `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns `{ slug: short_id, display: title, color }`.
+- Extend its query matching to title (substring, as today) + short-id prefix + full-ULID prefix/exact (consumed by the autocomplete card's 3-way search).
+- Frontend task metaMap keyed by short id, carrying title + color, so `MentionWidget` can label with the short id and tooltip with the title, and autocomplete can label the dropdown with the title.
+- Resolver accepts BOTH 7-char short id and full 26-char ULID (full → last-7 → lookup), reusing the core resolver. Single resolution semantics shared by pills (forgiving display), tool API (forgiving input), and autocomplete.

 ## Out of scope
-- Inline pill decoration / shape-matching in the editor → short-ids-cm6-pills
-- Autocomplete insertion/label → short-ids-cm6-autocomplete
+- Inline pill shape-matching / tooltip wiring → short-ids-cm6-pills
+- Autocomplete dropdown/apply behavior → short-ids-cm6-autocomplete

 ## Acceptance
-- `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns short-id slugs + title display names.
+- `search_mentions(entity_type=task)` returns short-id slugs + title display names, and matches a query by title, by short id, and by full ULID.
 - Frontend resolves a short id OR a full ULID → task title/color without a title-slug round-trip.

 Depends on core derivation/resolver.
\ No newline at end of file
